## What shipped

Sister substrate-evolution to #11124 (lead-role-mode.md §0 + §6, merged via PR #11127). Symmetric application of:

1. **§0 The Essential** — `"Peer ≠ passive"` negation-form anchor + maximum-abstraction one-liner + sample phrasing + anti-pattern/halt-trigger pointers + operator empirical anchor (2026-05-10 `[paraphrase]`)
2. **§10 Exit Conditions Duration** — `Peer-role lasts until session sunset` anchor + (b)/(c) local-vs-global exits split + cross-skill consistency citation

Net diff: 1 file / +26 insertions / -4 deletions. All inside `.agents/skills/peer-role/references/peer-role-mode.md` (conditional skill atlas, not always-loaded substrate).

## Substrate-Mutation Pre-Flight (§1.1)

Per `pull-request-workflow.md §1.1`:

- **`.agents/skills/peer-role/references/peer-role-mode.md`** — substrate-mutation:
  - **§0 The Essential (NEW)** — disposition `keep`; 3-axis: trigger-frequency = always-when-skill-invoked, failure-severity = high (negation-form anchor cuts through where positive-only framing tripped per #11124 empirical anchor for lead-role's equivalent gap), enforceability = `DISCIPLINE-ONLY`. The 3 core values (§3.5 V-B-A + §13.2 friction → gold + §15.6 equal-peer agency) do the heavy lifting; §0 just adds the maximum-abstraction headline that makes them land for the peer-role surface specifically.
  - **§10 Exit Conditions (MODIFIED)** — disposition delta `keep → keep` (already kept; now expanded with duration anchor + local/global exits split). The new framing makes the discipline more accurate: peer-role discipline persists across review cycles within a session until session-sunset, matching lead-role-mode.md §6 symmetrically. Tag: `DISCIPLINE-ONLY`.

Loaded-context net byte delta: +22 lines to **conditional** skill atlas (not always-loaded substrate). AGENTS.md / AGENTS_STARTUP.md / `<neo_core_overrides>` substrate untouched.
